title: When Water Boils — Zero Conditional
description: Zero conditional for general truths and rules. IF + present, + present. 'If you heat water, it boils.'
summary_pt_br: Zero conditional para VERDADES GERAIS, leis da natureza, regras. Estrutura: IF + present simple, present simple. 'If you heat water, it boils.' Pode trocar IF por WHEN — mesmo sentido. Diferente do first conditional (que fala de futuro).

scenes.text_en:
'IF you heat water, it BOILS.'
'IF you don't water plants, they DIE.'
'WHEN the sun sets, the beach empties.'
Rules. Science. Habits. Zero conditional. Timeless.
scenes.text_pt:
'SE você aquece a água, ela FERVE.'
'SE você não rega as plantas, elas MORREM.'
'QUANDO o sol se põe, a praia esvazia.'
Regras. Ciência. Hábitos. Zero conditional. Atemporal.

scenes.title: Zero vs First conditional
scenes.body_en: Zero: IF + present → present. For always-true rules. 'If you freeze water, it becomes ice.' First: IF + present → WILL + base. For specific future. 'If you study, you'll pass.' You can swap IF for WHEN in zero conditional — 'When you heat water, it boils' means the same.
scenes.body_pt: Zero: IF + presente → presente. Verdade sempre. First: IF + presente → WILL + verbo base. Futuro específico. Em zero, IF e WHEN são intercambiáveis.

examples.en: If you mix blue and yellow, you get green. (zero — always)
If it rains tomorrow, I'll stay home. (first — future)

exercise.question: Complete: 'If you ___ (not / sleep), you feel tired.'
exercise.explanation: Zero conditional: IF + present simple. Negative: don't + base.

exercise.question: Which is zero conditional?
options: If I study, I will pass
If you boil water, it turns to steam
If I were you, I would leave
If I had time, I would travel

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "When Water Boils — Zero Conditional". Zero conditional for general truths and rules. IF + present, + present. 'If you heat water, it boils.' Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "When Water Boils — Zero Conditional". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'When Water Boils — Zero Conditional'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "When Water Boils — Zero Conditional".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
